behavior_summary: Provides a short description when the player examines the SMALMUSH entity: it emits a single bark line reading "mushroom" and then terminates the U8P_SMALMUSH::look interaction.
The behavior is deterministic and contains no menus, branches, flag reads/writes, or external calls — purely descriptive feedback for the U8P_SMALMUSH::look (examine) action.
notable_control_flow: Single process flow: U8P_SMALMUSH::look runs, issues one Bark ('mushroom'), then the process suspends/ends.
No conditional logic, menu presentation, or state changes are present in the canonical flow.
open_questions: Is SMALMUSH an item, scenery object, or NPC? The script only provides a U8P_SMALMUSH::look handler so the actor type is not explicit.
Decompiler artifacts include low-confidence tokens ('{' and 'suspend') — does the engine perform any additional operations on suspend beyond ending the process?
